title: Chat
agent_unavailable: This Agent is unavailable. History remains readable, but no new messages can be sent.
reconnecting: Reconnecting and recovering the Task stream...

contexts.loadFailed: Draft Contexts could not be recovered.
contexts.tooMany: You can attach at most {{count}} files to one message.
contexts.uploadFailed: The Context could not be uploaded or parsed.
contexts.removeFailed: The draft Context could not be removed.
contexts.readFailed: The Context could not be opened.

errors.load: The Task could not be loaded.
errors.options_load: Agent or model options could not be refreshed. Existing history is still available.
errors.send: The message could not be sent.
errors.model_update: The Task model could not be changed.
errors.task_not_found: The Task could not be found.
errors.task_running: A response is already being generated.
errors.task_send_pending: A message is already being sent.
errors.subtask_not_found: The failed response could not be found.
errors.model_override_not_allowed: Change the Task model before sending.
errors.context_too_large: The Task context is too large for the selected model.
errors.context_not_found: The Context could not be found.
errors.context_not_ready: A Context is still being processed or is already bound.
errors.provider_invalid_response: The model returned an invalid response.
errors.malformed_ack: The server returned an invalid acknowledgement.
errors.upload_type_invalid: This file type is not supported.
errors.upload_too_large: The file exceeds the upload size limit.
errors.extraction_invalid: The file could not be parsed.
errors.extraction_empty: The file does not contain readable content.
errors.extraction_too_large: The extracted content exceeds the size limit.
errors.extraction_unsupported: This file type cannot be parsed.
